hero.sub: From foundational concepts to the subtlest harmonic colours — learn to hear what you play, and play what you hear.

pillars.label: Our method
pillars.p1_body: Every concept is grounded in active listening. You identify harmonic colours before naming them — because theory must serve music, not the other way around.
pillars.p2_body: Master the movement of voices through chord progressions. Gradual exercises from simple to complex, from baroque to contemporary jazz.
pillars.p3_body: Every rule is illustrated with real excerpts — Bach, Debussy, Coltrane. Harmony as a universal language, decoded across its many dialects.

demo.label: Exercise preview
demo.p1: Visualise in real time the movement of each voice through a harmonic progression. Identify parallel, contrary, and oblique motions.
demo.p2: Each exercise adapts to your level and guides you toward the natural resolution of harmonic tensions.
demo.vl_label: Progression I - IV - V - I in C

cta.label: Early access
cta.sub: The platform is under development. Sign up for free beta access and help shape the features to come.
cta.note: Free beta access · No commitment · No spam
